Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 15 

PRVDR_ACO_YEAR 

LABEL: Year of Provider ACO Source Record 

DESCRIPTION: This field is the year of the provider ACO source record; it corresponds with the calendar year (CY) of 
claims. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ACO_YEAR 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ACO_YEAR 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: — 

VALUES: 2015, 2016 

COMMENT: —
